overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime cruise through Night City. The player follows a teal sports car from surface streets through intersections, passing under the Capitola sign and ascending to an elevated highway with dense neon signage and industrial elements.

approaching intersection and beginning to turn

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a neon-lit city street. The dashboard displays green holographic readouts while the exterior shows wide asphalt roads lined with red-leafed trees and green neon building facades. A pedestrian walks on the left sidewalk as the vehicle approaches a crosswalk and intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with prominent overhead signage

events.description: following a teal sports car through the intersection
turning right at intersection following the teal car
passing under the red Capitola overhead sign

agents.ego_description: following a teal sports car through intersections and executing a right turn

notable_agents.action: teal sports car driving ahead, leading the way through traffic

entered.detail: large red overhead sign with white text marking the district
building with prominent red Fuyutsuki signage
large illuminated advertisement on building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through a busy commercial intersection, following a teal sports car. After passing under the prominent red Capitola sign, the driver executes a right turn onto a narrower street lined with the Fuyutsuki building and purple neon billboards. The crosswalk markings move from the distance to the foreground as the vehicle progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with dense urban architecture

events.description: ascending ramp from surface streets to elevated highway
lighting becomes more intense with dense neon reflections

agents.ego_description: ascending the elevated highway ramp while following the teal car

notable_agents.action: teal sports car maintaining lead position on the ramp

entered.detail: curved on-ramp with red and white striped barriers
building facade with black and white checkered pattern
concrete and metal framework of the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends a curved ramp transitioning from surface streets to an elevated highway. The environment becomes more enclosed with overhead structures and checkered building facades passing by. Dense neon signage clusters appear on the left while the vehicle follows the teal sports car up the incline.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed elevated highway with industrial piping and dense neon advertising

events.description: entering the industrial section with exposed pipes and conduits
passing the orange For Lease neon sign

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway through the industrial neon district

entered.detail: large exposed industrial pipes and conduits running along the highway
orange neon sign reading For Lease suspended over the road
narrow corridor formed by overhead structures and buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment travels through a narrow, enclosed elevated highway section characterized by industrial pipe clusters on the right and dense neon advertising. The vehicle passes under an orange For Lease sign while the overhead highway structure looms closer. The environment feels more industrial and confined compared to the open streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from open surface streets to a confined, industrial elevated highway. It begins inside a futuristic vehicle with green holographic dashboard readouts, cruising past red-leafed trees and green building facades toward a busy intersection. As the vehicle follows a teal sports car under a prominent red Capitola sign, the scene shifts through a right turn onto a narrower street lined with purple neon billboards and the Fuyutsuki building. The camera then ascends a curved ramp, moving from the open city level into a more enclosed environment characterized by checkered facades and dense clusters of neon signage. Finally, the path narrows into a high-altitude industrial corridor where the vehicle passes under an orange For Lease sign amidst looming overhead structures and heavy pipe clusters.
